story: A unique voice in American music was born on August 26, 1949. Leon Redbone, known for his deep, gravelly tones and old-timey style, entered the world in Nicosia, Cyprus. bonus_fact: Leon Redbone's real name was Dickran Gobalian.

story: Groovy tunes were in Bob Cowsill's future from the start. Born in Newport, Rhode Island in 1949, he became part of the family band The Cowsills.
